narrative.headline: What 2018 Mitsubishi Outlander owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 55 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (20% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: WHEN REVERSING THE VEHICLE IF YOU SWITCH IT INTO DRIVE TO FAST THE VEHICLE COMPLETELY STALLS OUT, REQUIRING YOU TO PUT THE VEHICLE IN PARK, SHUT IT OFF, RESTART THE VEHICLE THEN GO. THIS IS COMPLETELY DANGEROUS. IT IS AN ACCIDENT WAITING TO HAPPEN AND SHOULD NOT BE HAPPEN ON A BR
